name: Bertani Trasporti Spa
message: Bertani Trasporti Spa is a road and rail transport company based in via Camillo Benso Conte di Cavour 58, in Castiglione delle Stiviere, in the province of Mantua, in Italy. For over 90 years, we have been dealing with mobility in the broadest sense of the term.bertanitrasporti.it
